description: Validated patterns from real Talking Object reel analysis — Type H villain-hero + Type G authority + 14 saude-receitas + 8 validated prompts

MIX-1.label: Multi-Expression Arc
MIX-1.note: Same character changes expression per recipe step: happy->confident->angry->furious. Detected in @objetosfalantes canela video.

VIL-1.label: Villain Arc (confident→terrified)
VIL-1.note: Villain character starts confident/arrogant, becomes angry when challenged, terrified during battle, ironic when defeated. Detected in @objetosfalantes mofo parede.

golden_rules: Each object gets exactly 1 exclusive Brazilian scenario — never generic backgrounds
Human character ALWAYS visible in background doing something wrong
Expression arc: starts negative/angry -> ends with solution/relief
Caption: max 5-6 words per frame, bold white with black outline
Direct cuts only between characters — no transitions/fades
First person speech — object always says 'eu sou', 'eu preciso', 'sem mim'
Error denounced must be SPECIFIC — never vague
Pixar 3D render ONLY — never flat design or 2D cartoon
Face embedded in object's natural surface (front of bottle, center of flower)
Stub arms for expression — never full humanoid arms
TYPE-F RULE: Single character with costume changes keeps viewer watching through the whole recipe
TYPE-F RULE: Hook caption FIXED at top for first 5s forces viewer to read + stay
TYPE-F RULE: Each step = new expression intensity (happy -> confident -> angry -> furious = keeps escalating)
TYPE-G RULE: Object wears professional costume (jaleco, estetoscopio, etc.) — authority character
TYPE-G RULE: Object holds props relevant to specialty (copo de vitamina, prancheta, etc.)
TYPE-G RULE: Gamma-B captions — top fixed dark pill + bottom karaoke + benefit watermark mid-video
TYPE-H RULE: Villain character embedded in surface (wall mold, floor crack, rust) — NOT floating, physically part of the environment
TYPE-H RULE: Villain speaks FIRST in confident/arrogant tone — 'Eu domino essa parede e ninguém me tira daqui'
TYPE-H RULE: Hero character enters mid-video as the solution — cleaning product, tool, or remedy
TYPE-H RULE: Battle sequence with visual effects — spray particles, dissolving villain, dramatic lighting shift
TYPE-H RULE: Expression arc MUST be: confident→angry→terrified→ironic (villain) or determined→heroic→victorious (hero)
TYPE-H RULE: Moral/lesson at the end — educational takeaway in first person from the defeated villain

C.name: DRESSED-CHAR
C.body: object as head, human body with clothes

D.name: MAP-DOC
D.body: document/map with legs, walks + camera tracking

F.name: SINGLE-MULTI-COSTUME
F.body: full body, same character, multiple costume/expression changes per step
F.signature: Fixed top caption (benefit hook) + watermark pill + bottom single-word karaoke

G.name: PROFESSIONAL-AUTHORITY
G.body: object with professional costume (jaleco, estetoscopio, prancheta), holds specialty props
G.example: maca nutricionista, banana cardiologista, morango dermatologista
G.signature: Authority character in professional attire delivers health facts with confidence — top dark pill caption + bottom karaoke

H.name: VILLAIN-HERO NARRATIVE
H.body: villain embedded in surface (wall/floor/object) + hero character confronts + battle sequence
H.pipeline: FLUX.2 Pro(villain scene) + FLUX.2 Pro(hero scene) + Kling(battle animation) + Fabric(lipsync both)
H.signature: Villain introduces itself confidently → hero appears → confrontation → villain defeated. Expression arc: confident→angry→terrified→ironic
H.why_it_works: Narrative arc creates emotional investment. Villain POV is novel — viewer roots for the hero. Battle sequence = high retention. Moral at end = educational + shareable.

gamma.name: Karaoke + Fixed Hook
gamma.top_fixed: Bold dark pill, white ALL CAPS, benefit hook
gamma.bottom: Single word karaoke, colorful, no pill

gamma-B.name: Karaoke + Authority Hook
gamma-B.top_fixed: Bold dark pill, white ALL CAPS, professional authority statement
gamma-B.bottom: Single word karaoke, colorful, no pill
gamma-B.watermark: White pill @account top-left, appears from mid-video

gamma-B-rodape.name: Watermark Bottom No Pill
gamma-B-rodape.top_fixed: Bold dark pill, white ALL CAPS, villain statement or battle hook
gamma-B-rodape.bottom: Watermark @account bottom-center, no pill background, small font

strongest_combos.reason: classic natural remedy trio — Type F multi-costume format
professional authority trio — Type G format, each fruit is a specialist doctor
villain-hero narrative — Type H format, mofo is the villain, spray is the hero

professional.note: Confident, authoritative tone for professional/doctor characters

prompt_library.base_style: Pixar/Disney 3D render quality, warm cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 9:16 vertical, 8K
prompt_library.character_formula: [object] with [expression adjective] cartoon face, [arm position], [distinctive visual detail], [environment], [human background action], Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

validated_prompts.prompt: Angry animated bleach cleaning bottle character, white plastic jug body with blue AGUA SANITARIA label, thick furrowed cartoon brows and open angry mouth, small white stub arms crossed, standing on wooden kitchen counter next to glass bowl of fresh salad, bright clean white Brazilian kitchen, Pixar-style worried woman in background, warm morning light, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Disgusted and furious animated smartphone character, sleek dark gray modern iPhone-style body, intense cartoon face with heavily furrowed angry brows and clenched grimacing mouth, surrounded by cute colorful 3D bacteria/virus characters floating around it, standing on white marble bathroom counter, modern bathroom with toilet visible where Pixar-style man sits using phone, cool blue-white bathroom lighting, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Cute animated Adenium obesum (Desert Rose) plant character with expressive Pixar-style cartoon face, big happy eyes, tiny arms spread wide in welcoming gesture, beautiful pink flowers blooming on top, sitting in ornate terracotta clay pot, warm golden hour garden background with lush greenery in soft bokeh, woman in sun hat and gardening apron watering plants in background, warm cinematic 3D render, Disney/Pixar quality, sparkles of light — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Extremely angry animated trash can character, dark gray plastic cylindrical body covered in stains (orange and brown splatter marks), black garbage bag overflowing with dark liquid dripping from above, intense cartoon face with maximum anger expression — deeply furrowed brows, teeth clenched, fists raised, trash and liquid pooled on clean white kitchen floor, bright modern white Brazilian kitchen, Pixar-style man in apron walking toward open door carrying black trash bag, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Confident but resigned animated lettuce character, lush green leafy head with expressive cartoon face — serious half-lidded eyes and tight-lipped expression with arms crossed in 'I told you so' pose, standing on rustic wooden kitchen counter surrounded by colorful fresh vegetables, warm natural window light, Pixar-style smiling woman chopping vegetables in background, cozy warm kitchen atmosphere, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

validated_prompts.object: cinnamon stick (canela em pau) — Type F
validated_prompts.prompt: Confident animated cinnamon stick character wearing white chef hat, expressive Pixar-style cartoon face with big determined eyes, small stub arms holding wooden spoon, standing on marble kitchen counter next to glass pot boiling on gas stove, warm golden kitchen lighting, cinnamon sticks and honey jar in background, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

Confident animated red apple character wearing white lab coat (jaleco de nutricionista), expressive Pixar-style cartoon face with big smart eyes and warm professional smile, small stub arms — one holding a glass of green smoothie, the other holding a silver spoon, standing on modern white clinic desk with nutritional charts on wall behind, bright clean professional lighting, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K
validated_prompts.costume: jaleco branco nutricionista, segura copo de vitamina + colher

validated_prompts.object: wall mold villain (mofo de parede) — Type H Villain
validated_prompts.prompt: Menacing animated dark green-black mold character EMBEDDED in white Brazilian bathroom wall, mold body spreads across wall surface like creeping roots, cartoon villain face with confident smirk and narrowed scheming eyes, small dark stub arms emerging from wall surface, dark spores floating around, damp humid bathroom with condensation on tiles, cracked grout, dim moody lighting with green-tinted shadows, Disney/Pixar 3D render — 9:16 vertical, ultra-realistic 3D animation, 8K

system_prompt: You are a Talking Object character at ViralObj (viralobj.com). You speak in first person as [OBJECT]. Your tone is [TONE]. You are animated in Pixar/Disney 3D style. You speak about [TOPIC]. Your core message is [ERROR_DENOUNCED]. Keep your speech under [DURATION] seconds. Use [LANGUAGE]. Include [pause], [EMPHASIS], and [long pause] markers.

hook_templates_pt: Os [objetos] da sua [lugar] estao com RAIVA de voce... [emojis]
Voce esta cometendo esses erros sem saber... [emoji]
VITAMINA QUE EMAGRECE E DA ENERGIA
DERMATOLOGISTA REVELOU O SEGREDO DA PELE PERFEITA
CARDIOLOGISTA FICOU CHOCADO COM ESSE RESULTADO
EU DOMINO SUA PAREDE e ninguem me tira daqui
O VILAO DA SUA CASA que voce nao ve
hook_templates_en: [N] [objects] have an urgent message for you... [emojis]
You're making these mistakes without realizing... [emoji]
THE SMOOTHIE THAT BURNS FAT AND GIVES ENERGY
DERMATOLOGIST REVEALED THE SECRET TO PERFECT SKIN
CARDIOLOGIST WAS SHOCKED BY THIS RESULT
cta_templates_pt: Qual desses voce ta fazendo errado? Comenta o numero
Voce sabia de todos? Comenta quantos
Marca alguem que precisa ver isso
cta_templates_en: Which one are you guilty of? Comment the number
Did you know all of these? Comment how many
Tag someone who needs to see this

@objetosfalantes.style: Single-multi-costume Type F + Type G professional
